testcase.name: test_signup_success_canada

failure.message: AssertionError: User not created in DB assert None is not None

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter107_customer_signup_signin.py:232: in test_signup_success_canada assert user is not None, "User not created in DB" E AssertionError: User not created in DB E assert None is not None

testcase.name: test_signup_currency_usa
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iter107_customer_signup_signin.py:164: in tenant_b_id assert resp2.status_code in [200, 201], f"Tenant B admin creation failed: {resp2.text}" E AssertionError: Tenant B admin creation failed: {"detail":"A super admin already exists for this tenant. Only one super admin is allowed per tenant."} E assert 400 in [200, 201] E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
